title: ouret revoluta
intro: Ouret revoluta, also known as the Velvet Oak or Roure, is a small evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. The leaves of this tree have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, due to its anthraquinone content. The health benefits of ouret revoluta include its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of ouret revoluta leaves can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effects.
